title: Toni Erdmann
actors: Sandra Hüller, Peter Simonischek, Michael Wittenborn
plot: A practical joking father tries to reconnect with his hard working daughter by creating an outrageous alter ego and posing as her CEO's life coach.
country: Germany, Austria, Monaco, Romania, France, Switzerland, Belgium
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 59 wins & 85 nominations total
